current.name: Lena Kovač
current.bio: 14 years in pastry. Trained at Le Cordon Bleu Paris. Lena tastes every batch before it ships — she has never approved a cookie she wouldn't feed to her own children.

current.name: Marcus Chen
current.bio: Former bread baker who switched to cookies and never looked back. Marcus manages the 48-hour cold fermentation schedule with the precision of a Swiss watchmaker.

current.name: Priya Sharma
current.bio: Priya develops every new flavor. She's tested over 200 chocolate sources and keeps a notebook of rejected combinations. The Raspberry Dark was her idea.

current.name: Diego Reyes
current.bio: The last pair of hands on every box. Diego inspects every cookie under a lamp, hand-stamps every box, and has been known to re-pack an order at 5pm because a corner looked off.

current.name: Thomas Berg
current.bio: Thomas runs the morning bake — 200 cookies before 8am, every day. He came from a high-volume bread bakery and treats consistency like a religion. If your cookie looks perfect, Thomas made it.

current.name: Olivia Watts
current.bio: Olivia handles our seasonal and special-order creations. Trained at The Culinary Institute of America, she's the reason our Lemon Lavender cookie exists — 47 test batches, zero compromises.

current.name: James Okonkwo
current.bio: James makes sure every box arrives on time and intact. He designed our crush-proof packaging system and personally stress-tests new box designs by shipping cookies to himself.

current.name: Sofia Ramirez
current.bio: Sofia answers every email, handles every substitution request, and once hand-delivered a replacement box to a customer whose cookies got lost in transit. She's the voice of Big Cookies.

past.name: Yuki Tanaka
past.bio: Opened the kitchen with Lena in 2024. Developed the original Double Dark Chocolate recipe. Now runs her own patisserie in Tokyo.

past.name: Sam O'Brien
past.bio: Started as a dishwasher. Within 6 months was managing the morning bake. Left to study food science at Cornell.

past.name: Claire Dupont
past.bio: Designed the original hand-stamped kraft box. Now creative director at a sustainable packaging startup in Berlin.

past.name: Raj Patel
past.bio: Built our entire sourcing network — from Valrhona chocolate to custom kraft boxes — in the first 6 months. Now runs logistics for a farm-to-table network in Vermont.

past.name: Emma Larsson
past.bio: Joined as our first intern while finishing her pastry diploma. Developed the Matcha White Chocolate cookie as her final project. Now head pastry chef at a Michelin-starred restaurant in Copenhagen.

past.name: Carlos Mendez
past.bio: Carlos ran the overnight cold-proofing shift — the most important hours in our process. Set a kitchen record of 340 cookies in a single shift. Left to open his own bakery in Mexico City.

internships.title: Internship Program
internships.description: Every semester, we welcome two pastry students into our kitchen for a 12-week paid internship. You'll work every station — dough prep, baking, QC, packing, and shipping — and develop your own cookie flavor as a final project. Past interns have gone on to Michelin-starred kitchens, food science PhDs, and their own bakeries.
details: Develop and pitch your own cookie flavor
internships.cta: Applications for Fall 2026 are open until August 15. Email your résumé and a brief note about why you want to bake with us.
